title: Visible egaps
description: Makes enchanted golden apples easier to see!
body:
Simply makes enchanted golden apples purple, making them easier to spot!

_Is also featured in my Endessentials pack!_![Preview!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/28d606b7dbf779de25a2d602d1a1c9753b761544.png)
